description: INEC BVAS (Bimodal Voter Accreditation System) deployment data. 2023 actual — stub.
notes: BVAS was first deployed nationally in 2023. INEC reported deploying BVAS to all 176,846 PUs. Malfunctions in some PUs led to supplementary elections.

gaps.note: INEC domain unreachable. BVAS deployment data in INEC post-election report 2023.
